description: Style NoteFun, style and comfort are the highlights of this black messenger bag from french connection. Carry it to college, office or for a casual day out with friends. A good looking bag with lots of space, it is sure to accommodate everything you think of, while you strut around looking super cool!Product DetailsFlap on top with plastic clasps and velcro closureZipped inner pocket with a large roomy compartmentCompartment at the back with velcro closuresAdjustable shoulder strap with claspsBranded zippers and sliders for easy useMaterial and CareShell: 100% polyester, Trim: 100% nylon and Lining: 100% polyesterDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtSizeHeight:29 cmWidth: 45 cmDepth: 12 cm
